S.O. 269(E).-1n exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 3 of the Energy Conservation Act, 2001 (52 of 2001), the Central Government hereby establishes the Bureau of Energy Efficiency with effect from the 1st day of March, 2002. [E No. 13/2/2001-EM(ii)] S. PRABHAKARAN, Spl.
